name: California Chicken Salad
recipeInstructions:
A tomatillo is also known as a Mexican Cherry tomato.
Use a dash of onion juice instead of minced onions if preferred.
1. Lightly mix the first 10 ingredients together.
2. Moisten with mayonnaise, using more or less as desired.
3. Mound in 4 decorative serving dishes.
4. Sprinkle the minced green chilies and minced sun-dried tomatoes on top.
5. Chill for 1 hour.
6. Serve with corn chips or crisp-fried tortillas as a light lunch.
